Package ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria

Class PizzeriaConfig

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaConfig
public class PizzeriaConfig extends Object
Pizzeria configuration loaded from a JSON file.
